no-bake-trail-mix-snack-bars.name: No-bake Trail Mix Snack Bars
instructions: Coat an 8-inch square pan with cooking spray.
Add rice cereal, oats, almonds, walnuts, cranberries, raisins, and wheat germ to a large bowl; stir with a spoon.
Place marshmallows, honey, and corn syrup in a saucepan over medium heat. Cook and stir until melted and smooth, about 5 minutes.
Pour the melted mixture over the cereal mixture and stir until thoroughly combined. Press mixture firmly into the prepared pan. Cool until firm and set, about 30 minutes.
Cut into 9 bars and place in individual sandwich bags. Keep refrigerated if the kitchen gets too hot.

north-indian-saag-chole-chickpeas-and-gr.name: North Indian Saag Chole (chickpeas And Greens)
instructions: Wash mustard greens and spinach until all dirt is gone. Trim and remove all fibrous material, then chop greens and set aside.

Bring 2 cups water and salt to a boil in a large stockpot. Add mustard greens, spinach, cabbage, and broccoli; cook over medium-high heat until soft, about 10 minutes. Puree with an immersion blender until smooth and creamy.
Combine 1/2 cup water and corn flour in a bowl to make a runny paste with no lumps. Add it to pureed greens and mix until well combined.
Cover and cook over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes. Mixture should be a medium consistency and not too runny; add more water if too thick.
Heat oil in a pot over medium-high heat. Add cumin seeds, then add onions and garlic. Saute until onions are translucent, about 8 minutes.
Add tomatoes, chile pepper, coriander, and ginger. Season with salt to taste. Add chickpeas and cook until heated through, about 5 minutes. Gradually stir in cooked greens.

nussecken-hazelnut-corners-lezzet.name: Nussecken (hazelnut Corners)
instructions: 1. For dough; add dough materials outside the flour inside a bowl.
2. After kneading the materials, proceed to the kneading process by adding the clay flour.
3. Oiled paper cool on the oven tray when dough softens.
4. Press the dough into the tray.
5. You can start making nuts sauce while waiting in the dough tray.
6. For nuts mixture; Take oil and melt with a pot.
7. Add sugar when oil starts to melt and cook until fokurdayana.
8. Mix the intermediate row.
9. Make nuts from rondodan into dust.
10. Add and mix vanilla on sugar.
11. 11. Then mix a little more by adding 2 cups of powder leaks.
12. Add the remaining 2 cups of dust, and then get from the stove.
12. August Pour some honey on the dough and release.
14 July Then add the nuts mixture on the dough.
15. Bake for about 15 minutes, until the pre-heated 180-grade bake.
16. Then remove the dough from the oven and cut into the triangle slices.
17. September You can serve the nussecken sweet, chocolate sauce.
18.  Afiyet olsun.
19. September What are the Tricks of the Nussecken Recipe? To give the trigen shape, slice the dough in square shape first.
20. Divided square slices into two diagonally.
21. So you can give the triangle shape.
22. Take care of the nuts you will use in the recipe in the form of dust.
23. Instead of chocolate sauce, you can also use plenty of cream chocolate.
